arts.ttl: Manuel Neuer feels Bayern Munich did not deserve to qualify in top 8 of Champions League
arts.sum: Bratislava’s late, stoppage time goal was nothing but a mere consolation, but Bayern needed a win by a much larger margin to have any sort of chance to bump up into a top right spot in the table and directly qualify for the knockout stages, avoiding the playoff round. Due to the three losses in their Champions League campaign earlier in the season to Aston Villa, Barcelona, and Feyenoord put Bayern in the predicament of needing other results to go their way on the final matchday of the preliminary round of play, but they did not get any sort of help.

arts.ttl: “Doesn’t feel like a win” — Thomas Müller looks ahead after Bayern Munich’s 3-1 Champions League League Phase finale win over Slovan Bratislava
arts.sum: But Bayern would have needed an astronomical goals bonanza to take destiny back within their own hands, anyway. The result leaves the Bavarians needing a play-off victory — against one of Manchester City or Celtic — to qualify for the Champions League knockouts.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel update: Bayern Munich forward speaks out on transfer, with Manchester United, Chelsea, Tottenham Hotspur linked
arts.sum: Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel speaks out on his future amidst speculation he could leave to join Premier League sides Manchester United, Chelsea or Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand explains why Man City's nightmare Champions League draw is a GOOD thing - as they prepare to face Real Madrid or Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Madrid knocked them out of Europe last season, but City trounced both Los Blancos and Bayern on their way to the title in 2022-23.

arts.ttl: Three Observations from Bayern Munich’s frustrating 3-1 win over Slovan Bratislava
arts.sum: Bayern Munich looked like they were heating up heading into the winter break but have stumbled hard in January. Bayern Munich were heading into this match up against probably the weakest team in the competition.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Postgame Show: Bayern Munich 3-1 Slovan Bratislava (Champions League)
arts.sum: Bayern Munich got the win it needed...but not enough goals (or help!). However, the Bavarians did not catch all of the breaks needed for a top eight finish and will now looks toward the playoff round of the competition for the next step.

arts.ttl: Match Awards from Bayern Munich’s undershot 3-1 win over Slovan Bratislava
arts.sum: Bayern Munich failed to finish in the top 8 of the Champions League league phase, but is through to the playoffs, after a 3-1 win against Slovan Bratislava in a match that could’ve used more goals and a matchday that could have used a little more luck. While Blackman and Barseghyan both had solid games, making many runs into the Bayern box on the break, the award goes to the goalscorer.

arts.ttl: Report: Up to 10 clubs in running for Bayern Munich surprise starter Mathys Tel
arts.sum: After a few days of loan/transfer speculation, Bayern Munich youngster Mathys Tel was selected for the starting XI by Vincent Kompany ahead of his team’s 3-1 victory over Slovan Bratislava in the Champions League . Daily Mirror journalist Ryan Taylor (via @iMiaSanMia ) check in with an update on Tel’s loan/transfer situation and indicated that as many as 10 clubs are in the mix:

arts.ttl: Villa Park bedlam sums up Celtic's gripping campaign as Real or Bayern await
arts.sum: Celtic's enthralling defeat at Aston Villa was a near-perfect illustration of the club's gripping, and ultimately successful, Champions League campaign.

arts.ttl: Man City avoid Champions League combustion as Real or Bayern await
arts.sum: Manchester City's Champions League hopes almost went up in smoke against Club Brugge - but a big improvement is needed to make the last 16, says BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty.
